/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/lncrna_mers.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lncrna_mers.dir/src/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lncrna_mers.dir/src/fragmenter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lncrna_mers.dir/src/ibf_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lncrna_mers.dir/src/query_processor.cpp.o -o lncrna_mers  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libbz2.tbd
